text: Healthy living is about taking care of your whole self. First, a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy. Regular exercise, even just thirty minutes of walking, strengthens your body and mind. Don't forget about sleep; getting seven to nine hours each night is essential for concentration and mood. Mental health is equally important. Find time to relax and manage stress through hobbies or mindfulness. Finally, aim for a healthy work-life balance. Set boundaries so you have time for family, friends, and yourself. Small daily habits make a big difference.
